title: eriachne pallescens var. muelleri
intro: Eriachne pallescens var. muelleri, also known as Mueller's eriachne, is a type of grass native to Australia, commonly found in dry and open woodland areas. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Mueller's eriachne is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to offer health benefits, including relief from fever, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as a treatment for colds and flu. Mueller's eriachne can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in traditional Australian medicine for centuries.
